# F015. Residual Momentum + LightGBM

## Positioning

This candidate tries to remove the obvious factor effects first and then rank the residual momentum. That makes it a better test of whether there is any genuine idiosyncratic trend left after the easy stuff is stripped away.

## Reference Basis

- [LightGBM: A Highly Efficient Gradient Boosting Decision Tree](../../references/papers/lightgbm_neurips_2017.pdf) - the residual ranker
- [Online Portfolio Selection A Survey](../../references/papers/2_12_Online_Portfolio_Selection_A_Survey.pdf) - online selection and rebalance framing

## Repo Anchors

### Operational Guardrails

Shared safety and execution rails used by every candidate before a signal can touch capital.
- [src/risk/manager.py](../../../src/risk/manager.py) - pre-trade risk gate and position haircut
- [src/brokers/paper.py](../../../src/brokers/paper.py) - paper-safe broker adapter
- [src/monitoring/health.py](../../../src/monitoring/health.py) - freshness, heartbeat, and kill-switch checks
- [src/backtest/engine.py](../../../src/backtest/engine.py) - deterministic offline backtest runner
- [src/backtest/matching_engine.py](../../../src/backtest/matching_engine.py) - queue-aware synthetic fill model
- [scripts/monitor_health.py](../../../scripts/monitor_health.py) - runtime health loop and stale-data monitor

### Market Data and Features

Point-in-time data loading plus the shared feature builder used by most signal stacks.
- [src/ingestion/loader.py](../../../src/ingestion/loader.py) - point-in-time market data loading
- [src/features/builder.py](../../../src/features/builder.py) - technical, lagged, and derived feature construction

### Cross-Sectional Ranker

The executable ranking path that turns scores into a tradable long/flat or top-k book.
- [src/models/lgbm.py](../../../src/models/lgbm.py) - LightGBM scoring model
- [src/features/builder.py](../../../src/features/builder.py) - feature matrix construction for the ranker

## Data / Feature Bundle

- Use the factor library to residualize raw returns before they reach the ranker.
- Keep the technical and lagged feature set aligned with the same point-in-time source.
- Make the residual step explicit so leakage cannot hide inside the score matrix.

## Execution Path

- Rank the residual momentum score and allocate only to the strongest names.
- Use the same risk manager and backtest engine to compare against raw momentum.
- If the residual leg is weak, let the system fall back to the simpler ranker instead of forcing exposure.

## Risk Controls

- Do not let factor residualization leak future information.
- Be explicit about the factor universe; if it is not maintained, the residual score is not valid.
- Drop the signal if costs eat the residual edge.

## Validation Gates

- Compare factor-neutral return and drawdown against F001 and F002.
- Check whether the residual score remains stable across different universes.
- Verify that the residual step improves signal quality rather than merely changing turnover.

## Archive Triggers

- Archive if factor-neutralization removes the entire edge.
- Archive if the score is too unstable to maintain.
- Archive if the residual workflow becomes a maintenance burden.

## Next Step

Use this to test whether there is any true residual alpha beyond the factor baseline.
